title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 successfully completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots without maps or navigation aids. This represents an advance over earlier Claude models which required complex helper infrastructure to accomplish similar game-playing tasks.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots, with no maps or navigation aids. The result matters because earlier Claude models needed complex helper infrastructure to handle similar game-playing tasks, so the vision-only run marks a measurable advance in multimodal inference. The takeaway: the model navigated and finished the game from pixels alone, removing the scaffolding prior versions relied on.
